Fixed pillows
can't keep up.

Your sleep posture shifts dozens of times each night. A pillow that can't follow leaves your neck unsupported — and you waking up stiff, tight, and tired.

How Vytasync
works for you.

Adaptive air core
8 independent air chambers respond to your movement — gently inflating and deflating to keep your neck aligned as your posture shifts.
Whisper-quiet pump
At just 20dB, the system operates below the threshold of your awareness. You sleep. It works.
One-touch control
The haptic dial lets you set firmness before bed. Set it once — the system handles everything after that.
Premium outer shell
Breathable knit cover over a sculpted form. Soft to touch, stable under your head.

Precision air chambers.
Invisible support.

Each of the 8 chambers adjusts independently in 0.5cm increments — targeted support to the exact zones your neck needs, in real time.

A system that adapts
to how you sleep.

Mode 01 — Traction

Gentle cervical traction.

Creates a gentle decompression effect along the cervical spine while you rest. No clinic required. No extra effort.

Mode 02 — Height Adjust

Your height. Your alignment.

Dynamically adjusts its height profile to keep your cervical spine neutral — regardless of sleep position.

Mode 03 — Breathwork

Wind down, naturally.

Gentle rhythmic pulsing guides your breathing into a calmer cadence — helping you fall into deeper sleep faster.

Your posture changes.
Your pillow should too.

Vytasync adapts in real time as you shift positions — maintaining ideal cervical alignment through the night with zero effort on your part.

Questions, answered.

Is my sleep data private? +
All processing runs locally inside the Vytasync Box. No data ever leaves your home.
How loud is it at night? +
20dB — quieter than a library whisper. Imperceptible to most sleepers.
What if I don't love it? +
30-night trial, full refund, no questions. Free return shipping worldwide.
Does it work for all sleep positions? +
Yes — side, back, and combination sleepers. The system detects your position and adjusts each zone accordingly.
Gen 1 vs Gen 2 — what's the difference? +
Gen 1 is manual adjustment. Gen 2 auto-learns your patterns over 7 nights. Both ship Q3 2026.
Can it help with snoring? +
Consistent cervical alignment helps maintain a naturally open airway during sleep — reducing the micro-collapses responsible for snoring and shallow breathing. The breathwork mode also guides your nervous system into a calmer state before and during sleep. Note: Vytasync is not a medical device and results vary by individual.
